scripts.dev: concurrently -n SITE,LIB,DOCS "pnpm run --filter site dev" "pnpm run --filter paleui dev" "tsx scripts/generate-docs.ts --watch"
scripts.build: pnpm run --filter paleui build && tsx scripts/generate-docs.ts && pnpm run --filter site build
scripts.test:run:docker-up: docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml up -d --wait && PW_TEST_CONNECT_WS_ENDPOINT=ws://localhost:3000/ PW_BROWSER_BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal playwright test
